query:
INSERT INTO suppliers ( name, description, shortDescription, publicWebsite, tradeWebsite, commission, categories, locations, isActive, credentialStage, createdAt, updatedAt ) VALUES ( 'Jet2 Holidays', '

Jet2holidays is one of the UK\'s leading package holiday operators, offering ATOL-protected holidays with flights, hotel, transfers, 22kg baggage and resort flight check-in included as standard. They operate from 12 UK airports to over 50 destinations across Europe, the Mediterranean, and beyond, with a focus on value, reliability and award-winning customer service.

', 'UK\'s leading ATOL-protected package holiday operator — flights, hotel, transfers and 22kg bags included.', 'https://www.jet2holidays.com', 'https://tradeportal.jet2holidays.com/', 'Commission varies — contact trade support on 0800 022 3730', 'Package Holidays;Tour Operator;Flights', 'Spain;Greece;Turkey;Portugal;Cyprus;Italy;Croatia;Bulgaria;Egypt;Tunisia;Canary Islands;Balearic Islands;Malta;Morocco', 1, 2, NOW(), NOW() )
